title: Welcome to Torishirojima Island
overview: A young boy with a wounded heart begins a new life on a quiet island.

title: Ways to Spend Your Summer Vacation
overview: The boy with the broken wings begins to settle into life on a tropical island.

title: Pirate Ship and Girl
overview: A mysterious chest is uncovered in the attic of a school.

title: One Summer's Treasure
overview: The crew goes searching for keys to a treasure chest.

title: Higeneko Adventure
overview: Hairi travels across the island in search of a pirate ship.

title: Across the Seven Seas
overview: Hairi learns the story of the Higenekos.

title: The Lighthouse, the Song and the Girl
overview: Hairi meets a girl sitting on a lighthouse. She is trying to find out what she wants to do.

title: Looking for Things to Do
overview: Tsumugi decides to make a balcony on the lighthouse out of the empty Paringles cans she's been collecting.

title: Tsumugi and Tsumugi
overview: Hairi and Shizuku look for Tsumugi, but Hairi ends up lost himself.

title: A Lifetime's Worth of Summer Breaks
overview: Hairi gives Tsumugi a summer break she'll never forget.

title: The Summer Butterfly and the Night Girl
overview: Hairi starts over at the island and meets a new girl.

title: Priestess of Sorakado
overview: Hairi ignores Ao's warning not to come back into the mountain at night. As it turns out, it was for good reason.

title: A Pair of Butterflies
overview: Ao continues her search for the butterfly she seeks.

title: Dawn Memories
overview: Ao and Ai have a lot of catching up to do.

title: The Girl Who Forgot Summer Vacation
overview: Hairi meets a lone girl on the island.

title: Not a Date
overview: Hairi visits the main island and talks a little about his past.

title: Natsudori Ritual
overview: Hairi and Shiroha need to make arrangements to prepare for the upcoming ritual. Shiroha's visions become clearer.

title: One More Summer Vacation
overview: Hairi tries to grant Umi's wish.

title: Magic Picture Diary
overview: Umi's true hopes for summer vacation are revealed.

title: Marriage
overview: The day of the ritual draws near.

title: Footprints in the Waves
overview: As summer draws to a close, Hairi begins to forget.

title: Towards That Summer
overview: Time moves on after summer ends.

title: Nanami
overview: Nanami wakes up on the island with no memory of how she got there.

title: Where the Sunshine Is
overview: Nanami is invited to make lanterns with Shiroha and her classmates for the Natsudori ritual.

title: Memories of the Future
overview: Nanami's true identity is revealed.

title: Pockets Stuffed Full
overview: Umi's story comes to an end.
